title: pouteria ephedrantha
intro: Pouteria ephedrantha, also known as the Bata, is a tropical tree native to the Pacific Islands, its bark and roots are used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Pouteria ephedrantha include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include relief from fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Pouteria ephedrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
